Description: Pilot's flagship travel center at I-40 Exit 42 (TN-222, Stanton), rebuilt and reopened in December 2024 as the largest store in Pilot's network near BlueOval City. Amenities include diesel lanes, truck parking with reserved spaces, 7 showers, laundry, a CAT scale, Subway, and Chester's Fried Chicken.

Independent 24-hour truck stop at I-40 Exit 66 (US-70) between Brownsville and Bells. Offers about 45 truck parking spots, 4 diesel lanes, 4 showers, a deli/fast food, laundry, and on-site tire, towing, and mechanic services.

Full-service TA travel center at I-40 Exit 68 (TN-138/Providence Road) southwest of Jackson. Offers 92 truck parking spaces with Reserve-It reserved parking, 7 diesel lanes, showers, laundry, a CAT scale, Country Pride restaurant, Subway, and TA Truck Service repair shop.

24-hour Pilot travel center at I-40 Exit 85 in Jackson. Offers about 95 truck parking spaces, 7 diesel lanes, 7 showers, laundry, WiFi, a Denny's restaurant, and Southern Tire Mart at Pilot truck care services.

Truck and trailer wash a quarter-mile north of I-40 Exit 87 in Jackson, offering hand truck washes, high-pressure trailer washouts (reefer, dry van, hopper, tank, end dump), detailing, and chrome accessories. Overnight parking is available for customers.

Full-service Kenworth dealership at I-40 Exit 85 in Jackson with heavy-duty truck repair, parts, and sales. Service department is open extended hours Monday-Friday (6:30 a.m. to midnight) and Saturdays.

Freightliner and Western Star dealership with Elite Support certified truck repair, parts, and sales near I-40 Exit 80 (US-45 Bypass) in north Jackson. Open Monday-Friday 7 a.m.-6 p.m. and Saturday 7 a.m.-3 p.m.

Chain hotel at I-40 Exit 56 (TN-76, Brownsville) with truck, bus, and RV parking explicitly listed among its amenities (approximately 5 truck spaces). Free breakfast, free WiFi, and free parking for guests.
Budget hotel about 0.2 miles from I-40 Exit 80 (US-45 Bypass) in Jackson with ample free parking explicitly including truck and bus parking. Offers free continental breakfast and free WiFi.

Business Name: THP Commercial Vehicle Scale Complex - Haywood County (I-40 Westbound)
Description: Tennessee Highway Patrol commercial vehicle scale complex on I-40 westbound at mile marker 50 near Brownsville (between Exits 47 and 56). HELD: the official tn.gov listing confirms the facility, mile marker, and phone but gives only a P.O. Box (P.O. Box 337, Brownsville, TN 38012) rather than a civic street address.

Business Name: TDOT Haywood County Welcome Center / Rest Area (I-40 Westbound, MM 44-45)
Description: TDOT rest area/welcome center on I-40 westbound at approximately mile marker 44-45 in Haywood County near Stanton, with restrooms, water, picnic tables, and separate truck parking. HELD: no official Tennessee source giving a civic address was found (tn.gov/TDOT SmartWay pages could not be retrieved); mile marker and amenities come from unofficial rest-area directories.

Business Name: TDOT Madison County Rest Area (I-40 Eastbound, MM 73)
Description: TDOT rest area on I-40 eastbound at approximately mile marker 73 in Madison County, west of Jackson between Exits 68 and 76. HELD: reported by unofficial rest-area directories; no official Tennessee source giving a civic address could be retrieved.

Business Name: Southern Tire Mart at Pilot - Jackson
Address: 30 Sand Pebble Rd (at Pilot Travel Center #366)
Description: Southern Tire Mart at Pilot truck care center reported at the Pilot Travel Center #366 at I-40 Exit 85 in Jackson, offering commercial tire service, preventive maintenance, and DOT inspections. HELD: the Jackson, TN location is indicated by a Michelin dealer-locator listing and Pilot truck-care network pages, but a second source explicitly tying the STM shop to this street address was not found.
